CREATE TABLE numbers (a INT, b INT);
SELECT (SELECT a FROM numbers WHERE b = 5) - (SELECT b FROM numbers WHERE a = 10);
SELECT n1.a - n2.b FROM numbers n1 JOIN numbers n2 ON n1.a = n2.b;
CREATE TABLE calculations AS SELECT a - b AS result FROM numbers;
SELECT result FROM calculations WHERE result < 0;
SELECT (a + b) - (b - a) AS calculation FROM numbers;
SELECT MIN(a - b) AS minimum_diff FROM numbers;
SELECT n1.a - n2.a AS difference FROM numbers n1, numbers n2 WHERE n1.a > n2.a;
